shortDescription: Look up user profiles and directory information from Microsoft Entra ID (Azure Active Directory) using delegated Graph access.

linkConfig.description: Sign in to grant HelkinSwarm access to your Entra ID directory profile

externalAccountsNeeded.description: Microsoft Entra work or school account

orchestratorUseCases: look up the current user's own Entra ID profile: name, email, job title, department, phone
find out who the current user's manager is
look up a colleague by email address or display name
retrieve canonical user profile fields for directory-style tasks
find people in the organization the user interacts with frequently

tools.name: entra_get_my_profile
tools.description: Retrieve the current user's own Entra ID profile. Returns display name, email (UPN), job title, department, office location, mobile phone, and manager name when available. Requires the user's linked Microsoft account.

tools.name: entra_find_people
tools.description: Search for people in your organization by name or email. Returns matching colleagues from your Entra directory with profile info (display name, job title, email, department). Uses the People API which ranks by your interaction history — most relevant colleagues appear first. Requires People.Read delegated scope.
useWhen: user asks to find a person in the organization directory
user mentions Entra, AAD, or Active Directory person lookup
user wants to look up a colleague by name or email
avoidWhen: searching for emails or email messages — use outlook_search_emails instead

query.description: Name or email address fragment to search for. E.g. 'John Smith' or 'jsmith@contoso.com'

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default: 5, max: 20.
